notes: Testnet contract addresses for demo.fact.market. Recommended target for responsible-disclosure reproducers — see ../security/disclosure.md.
gitTag and bytecodeHash will be populated on first tagged release (v1.0.0).

verification.howToVerify: git checkout <gitTag>; pnpm install; pnpm build; sha256sum build/MarketFactory_MarketFactory.code.boc; compare to bytecodeHash above and to the on-chain bytecode shown on testnet.tonscan.org.
